## Checklist

- [ ] My example file is in the correct `galleries/examples/` subdirectory
- [ ] My file has a proper RST docstring with a title and description
- [ ] My file includes a `References` section listing the matplotlib functions/methods used
- [ ] My file includes a `tags` section with `plot-type` and `level`
- [ ] I ran `pytest tests/ -v` and my example passes
- [ ] My commit message follows the 50-character subject line convention
